data.body:
CONTAINER REVIEW — G3 (child coverage) of parent epic `5fd2` × child `db7b` (REVIEW_RESULT reducer-ignored sidecar / observability substrate).

VERDICT: CLEAN — no uncovered parent acceptance/success criterion attributable to this pairing. Every parent criterion in this child's concern-area (the REVIEW_RESULT sidecar + per-pass latency/cost instrumentation + the sidecar/signature rollout-ordering) is FULLY covered by this child or by a named sibling. No findings.

═══ AFFIRMED COVERAGE MAP (4-bucket; parent criteria this child is the natural owner of) ═══

- Parent SC#5 ("Every review emits a `REVIEW_RESULT` sidecar event sufficient to reconstruct per-criterion FP/remediation analysis offline, without taxing rebar's hot paths") → FULLY covered. db7b AC1 (sidecar emitted with finding fingerprints; reducer skips the type), AC2 (head/.cache/deps/validate unaffected), AC3 (offline reconstruction of per-criterion FP/remediation possible). Grounded: REVIEW_RESULT absent from KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES so the reducer skips it; present in _NON_REPLAY_KNOWN_TYPES + the write allow-list.

- Parent AC "`REVIEW_RESULT` reducer-ignored sidecar event with finding fingerprints; reducer skips the type; override logging; offline-analysis-ready" → FULLY covered (split, both owners named):
  - fingerprints / reducer-skip / offline-analysis-ready → db7b AC1/AC3 (the finding `id`/fingerprint minted by orchestrator `ca03`, RECORDED by the sidecar — the one-owner/reference-not-restate contract).
  - "override logging" → covered-by-a-named-sibling for the claim-path audit (`092b`'s `FORCE_CLAIM: …` comment with justification, verify-PASS), AND db7b's own "What" captures "override justifications" in the sidecar payload. So override logging is not orphaned — NOT an absence against this pairing.

- Parent Tests/verification AC ("the reducer-ignored REVIEW_RESULT sidecar (reducer skips the type; head/.cache/deps/validate unaffected)") → FULLY covered. db7b AC1 (reducer skips the type) + AC2 (hot paths unaffected); the dedicated `sidecar.prune` (keep most-recent RETAIN_PER_TICKET, remove older, best-effort post-emit) — NOT compaction (which preserves reducer-ignored events by design) — is the bounding mechanism (db7b AC4), correctly distinguished from compaction in the child's corrected Scope.

- Parent Instrumentation/logging AC ("the gate records per-pass latency + cost (the fast claim-path check and the out-of-band review) so latency/cost targets … refined PASSIVELY from dogfood data") → FULLY covered, for the CAPTURE/recording half. db7b's added AC "Capture per-pass LATENCY + a COST proxy in the sidecar metadata (`coverage.metrics`: det_ms, llm_ms, total_ms, llm_calls; the fast claim-path check recorded as a constant LLM/network-free marker)". (The STRUCTURAL 50ms fast-claim proving check — "no LLM/network on the claim path" — is correctly owned by sibling `092b`, not duplicated here, per the parent's own note.)

- Parent rollout/coexistence for the new events → FULLY covered (and this is db7b's legitimate lane, not ce75's): db7b's added "ROLLOUT / cross-clone coexistence" AC — preserved-and-ignored-by-older-clones, fsck WARNs on newer event types, readers-before-writers. Grounded in `_NON_REPLAY_KNOWN_TYPES` + `is_unknown_newer_type`. (`ce75` was closed superseded; its prior G3 review already named `db7b` as the owner of the sidecar+signature rollout-ordering — consistent, no contradiction.)

COVERED-BY-A-NAMED-SIBLING (so NOT absences against this pairing — roster-verified): the finding-`id` MINTING (sole owner) → orchestrator `ca03`; the Pass-4 coach that REFERENCES the id → `75a9`; the ADVISORY surfacing cap (top-N=10, blocking exempt) → `487d`/`55de`; the claim-path `--force` audit-log + 50ms structural check → `092b`; per-criterion verdict/severity content that the sidecar RECORDS → `1913`/`acc1`/`487d`.

STRUCTURAL: db7b stays in-scope as the capture/observability substrate and does not over-reach — it RECORDS the id (does not mint it) and bounds growth via a dedicated prune (not by mis-reusing compaction, which the corrected Scope explicitly calls out).

G3 NET: NO uncovered parent criterion attributable to this (parent + db7b) pairing. Every parent acceptance/success criterion in this child's concern-area is fully covered by db7b or by a named sibling; findings list is EMPTY.
